seo.title: YumiScan — Pricing and credits for scanning Japanese labels
seo.description: View YumiScan offers, credit packs, Scan AI and AI Assistant features, plus the payment methods accepted at checkout.

hero.title: A clearer page to understand credits and buy with confidence.
hero.description: Find all plans, what Scan AI and the AI Assistant unlock, the accepted payment methods, and the key answers before purchase.

overview.title: What your credits unlock
overview.subtitle: Pricing stays simple: buy credits once, then use them at your own pace whenever you need them.

scan_ai.title: Scan AI
scan_ai.desc: Photograph a Japanese label and get a clear ingredient reading based on your active criteria.

assistant_ai.title: AI Assistant
assistant_ai.desc: Prepares useful phrases, summarizes the risk, and helps you ask for a safer alternative.

history.title: Scan history
history.desc: Find your results, captures, and purchases again without starting from scratch.

no_subscription.title: No subscription
no_subscription.desc: One-time payment only. Your credits stay available with no expiration.

payments.title: Payment and trust
payments.description: Checkout only shows payment methods that are actually available for your device, country, and Stripe configuration.
payments.note: Payment is secure and processed by Stripe.
